description: Pre-configured scheduled tasks for Agent Team

tasks.name: TrendScout Scan
tasks.prompt: Scan current tech/SaaS trends across Product Hunt, Hacker News, and Reddit. Focus on AI tools, automation, and developer productivity.

tasks.name: Platform Health Check
tasks.prompt: Run platform health check: instance, database, disk, RAM, cache hit rate, runaway requests. Alert on any critical issues.

tasks.name: Daily Cost Report
tasks.prompt: Generate daily token cost report by agent and model. Compare with yesterday, check budget status, flag anomalies.

tasks.name: Cache Hit Monitor
tasks.prompt: Check cache hit rate. If below 60%, investigate cause and report to Max immediately with analysis and remediation suggestions.

tasks.name: Weekly Funnel Audit
tasks.prompt: Perform weekly conversion funnel audit. Analyze visit→signup→trial→paid rates, identify biggest drop-offs, propose A/B tests. Remember: 1 test at a time, minimum 7 days.

tasks.name: CEO Daily Briefing
tasks.prompt: Generate the daily CEO briefing. Synthesize updates from all team agents: Vigor (growth/trends), Fidus (ops/costs), Optimo (conversion/tests), Mercury (outreach/pipeline). Format as concise Telegram message.

tasks.name: Prospect Research
tasks.prompt: Research 5 new DTC/ecommerce founder prospects matching our ICP. Draft personalized cold emails (<100 words each). Check opt-out list. Prepare for sending via SES. Max 20 emails/day.
